title: Cracca rugelii
intro: Cracca rugelii, also known as American wild coffee or wild coffee, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to North America, belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The bioactive constituents of Cracca rugelii include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Cracca rugelii is commonly prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to make a decoction, which is used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and nervous system disorders.
